resources.string: Advancing science, developing talent, and strengthening Indonesia\'s global reputation through education and innovation
Targeting International Quality, YPSL Bumi Siliwangi Strengthens Synergy Through Halalbihalal
Bandung, UPI - The Laboratory School Provider Foundation (YPSL) Bumi Siliwangi held a family Halalbihalal with the theme \"Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr Wisdom to Boost...
Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia once again achieved brilliant success by winning the 2024 Impactful Diktisaintek category award...
UPI\'s Digital Education Innovation in the Global Era
UPI continues to drive digital transformation in the national education system through various technological innovations developed by the academic community...
Life at Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia (UPI) is not just about studying, but also about growing and contributing beyond academic boundaries.

• Student Portal
• Faculty Portal
• Library
• UPI Journal
Jl. Dr. Setiabudhi No. 229 Bandung 40154\nE-mail: humas@upi.edu

UPI has various facilities to support its commitment as a leading and outstanding university, including the following:

a. 123 Lecture Rooms used from 07.00 - 18.00 WIB.
b. Library with a collection of 69,802 book titles or about 143,836 copies.
c. Micro teaching, which serves as a means for developing practitioners as prospective teachers.
d. Language Center with a complete Language Laboratory.
e. Guidance and Counseling Technical Implementation Unit.

The University provides several supporting facilities for its students to gain comfort in studying and living on campus. Dormitories are provided for male and female students scattered in various campus locations.

To support the development of student skills in physical education and develop student talent, UPI provides sports facilities as follows:

a. Sports Hall
b. Soccer Field
c. Volleyball Court
d. Badminton Court
e. Basketball Court
f. Softball Field
g. Tennis Court
h. Swimming Pool
Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia organizes various education programs including undergraduate, postgraduate, professional, specialist, and diploma programs.
Faculty of Language and Literature Education
Faculty of Mathematics and Natural Sciences Education
Faculty of Technology and Vocational Education
Faculty of Sports and Health Education
Faculty of Economics and Business Education
Faculty of Arts and Design Education

Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia continues to be committed to improving the quality and quantity of research as a manifestation of the Tridharma of Higher Education. Through the Institute for Research and Community Service (LPPM), UPI facilitates various innovative research activities that have a wide impact on society.

1. Education and Learning Innovation
2. Pure Science Development
3. Applied Technology and Engineering
4. Social Sciences, Humanities, and Arts
5. Community Empowerment and Public Policy

Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia
Jl. Dr. Setiabudhi No. 229 Bandung
40154 West Java - Indonesia

E-mail: sekuniv_upi@upi.edu
